buyer_problem_map.issueSummary: Heatwave searches can push readers toward fast cooling purchases.
buyer_problem_map.buyerProblem: The reader needs to separate real compressor ACs from fans, mini coolers, and risky imports.
avoidConfusions: smart AC controller sold as cooling hardware

affiliateFitNotes: Heavy compressor ACs should prefer local retailer routes.
AliExpress and Temu are better fits for accessories unless local stock and returns are clear.
riskNotes: Do not turn a general heatwave news item into product links unless the buyer problem is concrete.

product_candidates.name: Fixture Portable AC 1

reviewComplaintSignal.label: Fixture buyer complaints 1
reviewComplaintSignal.summary: Buyers mention hose fit, night noise, drainage, and bulky returns.

product_candidates.localRiskNote: Check voltage, plug, window kit, stock route, warranty territory, and bulky-return terms.
product_candidates.returnRiskLabel: Bulky return route must be visible before checkout.
product_candidates.bestFor: One-room cooling where a window hose can be installed.
product_candidates.skipIf: Skip if you cannot vent hot air outside or return a heavy appliance locally.
product_candidates.keyCheck: Confirm compressor AC class, BTU rating, hose kit, voltage, delivery date, and return route.

contentBlocks.heading: What is moving now
contentBlocks.body: Heatwave demand can make cooling products sell quickly and make weak listings look more attractive than they are.

contentBlocks.heading: Quick answer
contentBlocks.body: For this issue, compare real compressor ACs by room size, hose setup, voltage, delivery timing, and return route.

contentBlocks.heading: Top 10 practical picks
contentBlocks.body: Use the product shortlist only after checking exact variants and local availability.
